goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'college'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Make sure you get 'price range', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the north and should be in the type of college
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of swimmingpool
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction
Make sure you get price range, postcode, and phone number
